name: ApproveAssignmentRequest
description: ApproveAssignmentRequest schema from Amazon Mechanical Turk API

allOf.description: The ID of the assignment. The assignment must correspond to a HIT created by the Requester.
A message for the Worker, which the Worker can see in the Status section of the web site.
A flag indicating that an assignment should be approved even if it was previously rejected. Defaults to False.
